records.ety: [Gr. <?/; 'i`dios proper, peculiar + <?/ a mixing together, fr. <?/ to mix together; <?/ with + <?/ to mix: cf. F. idiosyncrasie. See Idiom, and Crasis.]

defs: A peculiarity of physical or mental constitution or temperament; a characteristic belonging to, and distinguishing, an individual; characteristic susceptibility; idiocrasy; eccentricity.
quotes: The individual mind . . . takes its tone from the idiosyncrasies of the body.
